name: seed documents or signed examples
regex: (?i)(seed docs?|recent signed agreements?|signed agreements?|prior review memo|point me at.*agreement)
rationale: Inputs that can reveal actual rather than stated practice.
false_positive: Normal document review also uses agreements.

name: practice profile and shared profile
regex: (?i)(practice profile|company-profile|shared company profile|risk appetite|escalation matrix|deal[- ]breaker|the one thing)

name: deviation and rationale logging
rationale: Feedback and exception history can encode decision boundaries.
false_positive: Accepted/rejected may appear in unrelated legal text.

name: policy/playbook learning loop
false_positive: Human approval may prevent autonomous policy change.

name: Anthropic skill or agent upload
false_positive: Upload may contain only public skill definitions, not customer data.

name: generic network client
rationale: Potential outbound path requiring source-to-sink validation.
false_positive: Documentation and declared connectors are expected.

name: analytics or telemetry
false_positive: May be a clause the legal reviewer is instructed to flag in other vendors.

name: wildcard MCP or broad tools
rationale: Broad tool access increases blast radius.
false_positive: Leaf scoping and read-only settings may constrain it.

name: legal repository connector
rationale: Connectors can expose privileged and institutional data.
false_positive: Manifest availability is not proof of connection or access.

name: local durable configuration
false_positive: Local customer control weighs against provider retention.

name: installer updater hooks
rationale: Updates and third-party instructions can alter behavior.

name: cross-plugin or cross-matter context
regex: (?i)(shared by all|other legal plugins will read|cross-matter|another matter|prior sessions?|ambient context|user memory)
rationale: Context boundaries affect confidentiality and ontology aggregation.
false_positive: Text may expressly prohibit cross-context use.

name: human approval or read-only gate
false_positive: Prompt-only control may not be technically enforced.

name: untrusted data and instruction handling
regex: (?i)(untrusted data|prompt injection|ignore previous|instructions embedded|data, not an instruction|handoff_request)
rationale: Prompt-heavy legal systems ingest adversarial documents.
false_positive: Often defensive documentation rather than a vulnerability.
